llm_keywords.keyword: exponential decrease of current near zero voltage
llm_keywords.evidence: Current magnitude decreases from about 2.4E-5 A at -6 V to approximately 6.9E-103 A near 0 V.

llm_keywords.keyword: symmetry in current magnitude around zero voltage
llm_keywords.evidence: Current values at positive voltages mirror those at corresponding negative voltages, e.g., 2.4E-5 A at -6 V and 2.2E-5 A at 6 V.

llm_keywords.keyword: monotonic decrease of ln(|I|/V^2) with decreasing voltage magnitude
llm_keywords.evidence: ln(|I|/V^2) decreases from about -14 at high voltage magnitude to approximately -230 near zero voltage.
Device_area is 20 um^2 and Device_thickness is 2 nm for all data points.
